title: grammitis limula
intro: Grammitis limula, also known as the False Lip Fern, is a species of fern in the family Grammitidaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grammitis limula include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Grammitis limula can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
